abstracts.abstract: By Representatives Giannino of Revere and Turco of Winthrop, a petition (accompanied by bill, House, No. 3915) of Jessica Ann Giannino (with the approval of the mayor and city council) relative to retirement benefits for Leo MacAskill, a retired police officer of the police department of the city of Revere.  Public Service.  [Local Approval Received.]

bill.title: An Act providing for violent act injury retirement benefits for retirement police officer Leo MacAskill

action.description: Read third and passed to be engrossed
